description: Perform a mobile-first audit of https://books.toscrape.com/ using Screaming Frog SEO Spider. The audit must use the 'Googlebot Smartphone' User-Agent and include a custom extraction for the viewport meta tag (CSS Path: `meta[name="viewport"]`, extracting the 'content' attribute). After crawling at least 50 pages, export the Internal HTML data to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/mobile_internal_html.csv and the Custom Extraction data to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/mobile_custom_extraction.csv. Document the user-agent used, the total pages crawled, and the presence of viewport tags in a report at ~/Documents/SEO/reports/mobile_readiness_report.txt.
